titles.en: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites
Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites

segments: : «إِذَا دَخَلَ اَلْمُعْتَمِرُ مَكَّةَ مِنْ غَيْرِ تَمَتُّعٍ وَ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ عِنْدَ مَقَامِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ سَعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ فَلْيَلْحَقْ بِأَهْلِهِ إِنْ شَاءَ ».
arabic.text: : «إِذَا دَخَلَ اَلْمُعْتَمِرُ مَكَّةَ مِنْ غَيْرِ تَمَتُّعٍ وَ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ عِنْدَ مَقَامِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ سَعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ فَلْيَلْحَقْ بِأَهْلِهِ إِنْ شَاءَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2944 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If an Mu'tamir (one performing Umrah) enters Mecca without intending Tamattu‘, performs Tawaf of the House, prays two rak'ahs at the Maqam of Ibrahim (as), and performs Sa'i between Safa and Marwah, he may return to his family if he wishes."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2944 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If an Mu'tamir (one performing Umrah) enters Mecca without intending Tamattu‘, performs Tawaf of the House, prays two rak'ahs at the Maqam of Ibrahim (as), and performs Sa'i between Safa and Marwah, he may return to his family if he wishes."

narratorChain.raw: 2944 - رَوَى مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites

segments: : «مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً فِي عُمْرَةٍ فَلْيَنْحَرْ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَحْلِقَ رَأْسَهُ » قَالَ «وَ مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً وَ هُوَ مُعْتَمِرٌ نَحَرَ هَدْيَهُ عِنْدَ اَلْمَنْحَرِ وَ هُوَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ وَ هِيَ اَلْحَزْوَرَةُ ».
arabic.text: : «مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً فِي عُمْرَةٍ فَلْيَنْحَرْ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَحْلِقَ رَأْسَهُ » قَالَ «وَ مَنْ سَاقَ هَدْياً وَ هُوَ مُعْتَمِرٌ نَحَرَ هَدْيَهُ عِنْدَ اَلْمَنْحَرِ وَ هُوَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ وَ هِيَ اَلْحَزْوَرَةُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2945 - It was narrated from Imam (as) that he said:
"Whoever brings a sacrificial animal during Umrah should slaughter it before shaving his head."
Imam (as) further said: "And whoever brings a sacrificial animal while performing Umrah should slaughter it at the designated slaughtering place (Manhar), which is between Safa and Marwah, at al-Hazwarah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2945 - It was narrated from Imam (as) that he said:
"Whoever brings a sacrificial animal during Umrah should slaughter it before shaving his head."
Imam (as) further said: "And whoever brings a sacrificial animal while performing Umrah should slaughter it at the designated slaughtering place (Manhar), which is between Safa and Marwah, at al-Hazwarah."

narratorChain.raw: 2945 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: 2945 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites

segments: اَلرَّجُلِ يَعْتَمِرُ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً ثُمَّ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ طَوَافَ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ ثُمَّ يَغْشَى اِمْرَأَتَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ «قَدْ أَفْسَدَ عُمْرَتَهُ وَ عَلَيْهِ بَدَنَةٌ وَ يُقِيمُ بِمَكَّةَ حَتَّى يَخْرُجَ اَلشَّهْرُ اَلَّذِي اِعْتَمَرَ فِيهِ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى اَلْوَقْتِ اَلَّذِي وَقَّتَهُ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِأَهْلِهِ فَيُحْرِمُ مِنْهُ وَ يَعْتَمِرُ.
arabic.text: اَلرَّجُلِ يَعْتَمِرُ عُمْرَةً مُفْرَدَةً ثُمَّ يَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ طَوَافَ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ ثُمَّ يَغْشَى اِمْرَأَتَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ «قَدْ أَفْسَدَ عُمْرَتَهُ وَ عَلَيْهِ بَدَنَةٌ وَ يُقِيمُ بِمَكَّةَ حَتَّى يَخْرُجَ اَلشَّهْرُ اَلَّذِي اِعْتَمَرَ فِيهِ ثُمَّ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى اَلْوَقْتِ اَلَّذِي وَقَّتَهُ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ لِأَهْلِهِ فَيُحْرِمُ مِنْهُ وَ يَعْتَمِرُ.

segments:
Hadith.2946 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Misma' ibn Abdul-Malik, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who performs an independent Umrah (Umrah Mufradah), then performs the Tawaf of obligation around the Ka'bah, but has marital relations with his wife before performing Sa'i between Safa and Marwah.
Imam (as) said: "He has invalidated his Umrah, and he must offer a camel (badnah) as a penalty. He should remain in Mecca until the month in which he performed the Umrah has passed. Then he must go to the Miqat specified by the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) for the people of his region, enter into Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2946 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Misma' ibn Abdul-Malik, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who performs an independent Umrah (Umrah Mufradah), then performs the Tawaf of obligation around the Ka'bah, but has marital relations with his wife before performing Sa'i between Safa and Marwah.
Imam (as) said: "He has invalidated his Umrah, and he must offer a camel (badnah) as a penalty. He should remain in Mecca until the month in which he performed the Umrah has passed. Then he must go to the Miqat specified by the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) for the people of his region, enter into Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."

narratorChain.raw: 2946 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ رِئَابٍ عَنْ مِسْمَعِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اَلْمَلِكِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي

titles.en: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites

segments:
Hadith.2947 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Burayd al-‘Ijli, from Abu Ja'far (as):
"He (a person who invalidates their Umrah) must go out to one of the Miqats, enter Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2947 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Burayd al-‘Ijli, from Abu Ja'far (as):
"He (a person who invalidates their Umrah) must go out to one of the Miqats, enter Ihram from there, and perform a new Umrah."

narratorChain.raw: 2947 - وَ قَدْ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ رِئَابٍ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ اَلْعِجْلِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى بَعْضِ اَلْمَوَاقِيتِ فَي

parts.text: أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ يَخْرُجُ

titles.en: Chapter on Declaring the Intention (ihlal) for a Nullified Umrah, Its Termination, and Its Rites

segments: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ دَخَلْنَا بِعُمْرَةٍ فَنُقَصِّرُ أَوْ نَحْلِقُ فَقَالَ «اِحْلِقْ فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ تَرَحَّمَ عَلَى اَلْمُحَلِّقِينَ ثَلاَثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ عَلَى اَلْمُقَصِّرِينَ مَرَّةً.
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ دَخَلْنَا بِعُمْرَةٍ فَنُقَصِّرُ أَوْ نَحْلِقُ فَقَالَ «اِحْلِقْ فَإِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ تَرَحَّمَ عَلَى اَلْمُحَلِّقِينَ ثَلاَثَ مَرَّاتٍ وَ عَلَى اَلْمُقَصِّرِينَ مَرَّةً.

segments:
Hadith.2948 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Salim ibn al-Fudhayl, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "We have entered Mecca for Umrah. Should we trim (taqsir) or shave (halq)?"
Imam (as) said: "Shave, for the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) invoked mercy for those who shave their heads three times and for those who trim their hair only once."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2948 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Salim ibn al-Fudhayl, who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "We have entered Mecca for Umrah. Should we trim (taqsir) or shave (halq)?"
Imam (as) said: "Shave, for the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) invoked mercy for those who shave their heads three times and for those who trim their hair only once."

narratorChain.raw: 2948 - وَ رَوَى صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ سَالِمِ بْنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ
